parameters.content:
## Weekly Business Intelligence Report

### Claude-Powered Executive Summary

### How it works
1. **Trigger:** Runs every Monday at 08:00. Computes the previous week's date window in your configured timezone.
2. **Collect:** Fetches data from three sources in sequence — Stripe (paginated charge history), Notion (CRM pipeline), and Google Sheets (ops metrics).
3. **Aggregate:** Normalises all data into a single structured item: net/gross revenue, refunds, deal counts, weighted pipeline value, and operational KPIs.
4. **Write:** Claude Sonnet 4 writes a 3-paragraph executive narrative — revenue performance, pipeline health, and operational highlights with a forward-looking observation.
5. **Deliver:** Composes a styled HTML email report and sends it via SendGrid. A Slack confirmation fires with a one-line summary.

### Setup steps
- [x] Anthropic Chat Model connected (Claude Sonnet 4)
- [ ] Connect SendGrid credential to Send via SendGrid and Send Error Email nodes
- [ ] Connect Google Sheets OAuth2 credential to GSheets: Ops Metrics
- [ ] Connect Slack credential to Slack: Report Sent
- [ ] Set `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY` env var
- [ ] Set `NOTION_API_KEY` and `NOTION_DEALS_DB_ID` env vars
- [ ] Set `GSHEETS_SPREADSHEET_ID`, `GSHEETS_SHEET_NAME`, `GSHEETS_LAST_ROW_RANGE` env vars
- [ ] Set `REPORT_EMAIL_FROM` and `REPORT_EMAIL_TO` env vars
- [ ] Set `REPORT_ALERT_EMAIL` env var (error alert recipient)
- [ ] Set `SLACK_CHANNEL_ID` env var
- [ ] Set `REPORT_TIMEZONE` env var (e.g. `Europe/Helsinki`, defaults to UTC)

## Trigger & Date Setup
Fires every Monday at 08:00. Computes last week's start and end as ISO timestamps, Unix epochs, and milliseconds — timezone-aware via Luxon.

## Data Collection
Fetches data from three sources in sequence. Stripe uses cursor-based pagination to retrieve all charges in the window. Notion queries the Deals database with a date filter and rate-limit delay. Google Sheets reads the latest ops metrics row.

## Aggregation & AI Narrative
Normalises all three data sources into a single structured item. Claude Sonnet 4 then writes a 3-paragraph executive narrative — revenue performance, pipeline health, and operational highlights with a forward-looking observation. Temperature is set to 0 for consistent tone.

## Report Build & Delivery
Assembles a styled HTML email with KPI cards, pipeline stage breakdown, and the AI narrative. Sends via SendGrid, then fires a Slack confirmation with net revenue and deal count.

## Global Error Failsafe
Independent trigger that catches any workflow execution failure and sends an error email via SendGrid with the execution ID and failed node name.
